li.t-esc: device.get('sysName') or device.get('hostname', device_id) if device else device_id

div.class: alert alert-danger d-flex gap-3 align-items-start mt-3

div.p: The device may have been removed from Observium.

div.class: alert alert-warning d-flex gap-2 align-items-start mt-2

div.strong: Some sections could not be loaded

div.t-attf-class: progress-bar {{ 'bg-danger' if pu>85 else 'bg-warning' if pu>60 else 'bg-success' }}

small.t-attf-class: fw-bold flex-shrink-0 {{ 'text-danger' if pu>85 else 'text-warning' if pu>60 else 'text-success' }}

div.t-attf-class: progress-bar {{ 'bg-danger' if mp>85 else 'bg-warning' if mp>60 else 'bg-success' }}
progress-bar {{ 'bg-danger' if sp>85 else 'bg-warning' if sp>60 else 'bg-info' }}
obs-status-line {{ 'bg-danger' if st_ev=='alert' else 'bg-success' if st_ev=='ok' else 'bg-secondary' }}

span.t-attf-class: badge {{ 'bg-danger' if st_ev=='alert' else 'bg-success' if st_ev=='ok' else 'bg-secondary' }}

div.t-attf-class: obs-status-line {{ 'bg-danger' if s_ev=='alert' else 'bg-warning' if s_ev=='warn' else 'bg-success' }}

span.t-attf-class: badge {{ 'bg-danger' if s_ev=='alert' else 'bg-warning text-dark' if s_ev=='warn' else 'bg-success' }}

t.t-value: [g for g in graph_types if g[3]=='performance']
[g for g in graph_types if g[3]=='network']
[g for g in graph_types if g[3]=='system']
[g for g in graph_types if g[3]=='sensors']

span.t-attf-class: badge {{ 'bg-success' if st_ev=='ok' else 'bg-danger' if st_ev=='alert' else 'bg-secondary' }}
badge {{ 'bg-success' if s_ev=='ok' else 'bg-danger' if s_ev=='alert' else 'bg-warning text-dark' if s_ev=='warn' else 'bg-secondary' }}
badge {{ 'bg-success bg-opacity-25 text-success' if p_adm=='up' else 'bg-secondary bg-opacity-25 text-secondary' }}

button.class: btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm py-0 px-2 obs-port-graph-btn
button.title: View traffic graph

span.t-attf-class: badge {{ 'bg-info bg-opacity-30 text-dark' if at=='loopback' else 'bg-success bg-opacity-30 text-dark' if at=='private' else 'bg-danger bg-opacity-30 text-dark' if at in ['public','global'] else 'bg-secondary bg-opacity-20 text-dark' }}

div.t-attf-class: alert {{ 'alert-danger' if alerts_failed else 'alert-success' }} d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-3

span.class: badge bg-info bg-opacity-20 text-dark border border-dark border-opacity-10

span.t-attf-class: badge {{ 'bg-danger' if a_st=='failed' else 'bg-warning text-dark' if a_st=='delayed' else 'bg-secondary' }}
